title: AgentTask
description: A task dispatched to a worker via Azure Service Bus

itemId.description: ID of the specific plan item

description.description: Full task description with acceptance criteria

workerProfile.description: Concrete stack profile for routing. Null = use default for the worker type.

specSnippet.description: Relevant portion of the original specification

contextJson.description: JSON string mapping taskKey -> resultJson for each dependency

dispatchAttemptId.description: ID of the DispatchAttempt entity tracking this dispatch

traceId.description: Trace correlation ID for this dispatch

dispatchedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the task was dispatched

councilContext.description: JSON string with the CouncilReport (or relevant excerpt) produced by the pre-planning council session. Injected into the worker prompt as a 'Council Guidance' section.
